solution: ```class Solution:
    def binaryGap(self, n: int) -> int:
        max_gap = 0
        last_pos = None
        pos = 0
        while n:
            if n & 1:
                if last_pos is not None:
                    max_gap = max(max_gap, pos - last_pos)
                last_pos = pos
            pos += 1
            n >>= 1
        return max_gap
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Single pass through the bits of n, tracking the last seen 1-bit position and computing gaps on the fly. Constant space and minimal CPU usage.
